curation_notes: Patch commit f74773f fixes CVE-2017-0223 by passing plastRParen to the recursive ParseExpr call in lib/Parser/Parse.cpp, correcting the right parenthesis location calculation for lambdas with parenthesized assignment expressions. Only 1 non-test source file was changed. The pre-assigned class buffer-overflow (from CWE-119) is correct — the commit message explicitly states 'we overwrite the buffer allocated in ScriptFunction::EnsureSourceString'. No sibling files share this vulnerability pattern as the fix is specific to a single call site in the expression parser.
